name: strongerzhuang--ad-account-support
description: Use this skill when users mention advertising accounts, ad account setup, Business Manager (BM), ad account suspension or ban, ad payment issues, or cross-platform ad operations. Triggers on: Meta / Facebook / TikTok Ads / Google Ads / YouTube / X (Twitter) / LinkedIn / Snapchat / Pinterest / Reddit / DV360 / Taboola / Outbrain. Also triggers on Chinese keywords: 广告账户 广告户 开户 投放账户 BM BM权限 广告账户被封 广告账户审核 海外广告 跨境投放 广告支付 广告结构 商务管理平台。
